inputs.prompt: <image>Please describe what you see in this image.
<audio>Now listen to this audio, what sound is this?
Can you tell me what the image just now showed and what the audio just now sounded like?
<video>Now watch this video and tell me what is happening.
What sound do you hear in the video just now?
What visual content do you see in the video just now?
Please summarize all the content we discussed: the image, the audio, and the video.
